name: Slack Technologies, Inc.
description: Slack is an AI-powered platform for work that centralizes team communication, collaboration, and project management. By integrating conversations, apps, and customer data into a single interface, it helps businesses of all sizes streamline workflows and automate tasks. Originally founded in the United States, Slack was acquired by Salesforce in 2021 and continues to serve as a digital-first ecosystem for global teams, enabling them to connect securely and work more productively through its extensive library of integrations and intelligent automation tools.
